meta.title: Code.ae — Build software. In Arabic.
meta.description: The AI coding studio for Arabic speakers. Prompt in Arabic, ship production TypeScript, deploy to Vercel. Built for the Gulf.

hero.subtitle: A live sandbox in the Gulf. A bilingual agent that actually understands you. Prompt once, ship a Next.js app with Supabase, push to GitHub, deploy to Vercel.
hero.trust: No credit card. Sandbox spins up in seconds.

features.title: Everything you need to ship
features.subtitle: One studio. Prompt, code, preview, and deploy — without leaving the browser.

items.title: An agent that thinks in Arabic
items.body: Write your idea the way you'd say it. The agent replies in Arabic, writes code in English, and never loses the thread.

items.title: A live sandbox in UAE North
items.body: Every project boots a fresh Linux sandbox next door — Azure Container Instances in UAE, single-digit latency across the Gulf.

items.title: Supabase in one click
items.body: Link a Supabase project and we inject the keys, mount the MCP tools, and let the agent design your schema in plain language.

items.title: Push to GitHub, publish to Vercel
items.body: OAuth once. Every build lives in a repo you own; every deploy is a URL you can share.

items.title: Real files. Real code.
items.body: Monaco editor, real terminal, live preview. Inspect, override, commit — nothing is hidden behind a wall of UI.

items.title: Self-healing previews
items.body: A watchdog agent auto-recovers crashed dev servers and fixes compile errors in the chat before they reach you.

how.title: From idea to live URL in minutes
how.subtitle: Three steps. No config files, no dev environment setup, no "does it work on your machine".

steps.title: Describe it in Arabic
steps.body: "ابني لي صفحة هبوط لعيادة أسنان مع نموذج حجز موعد" — and the agent gets to work.

steps.title: Watch the app take shape
steps.body: Files appear in the tree, the preview compiles live, the terminal streams logs. Steer at any moment.

steps.title: Ship it
steps.body: Push to GitHub, deploy to Vercel, or connect your custom domain. The URL is yours.

builtFor.title: Built for the Gulf
builtFor.subtitle: Most AI coding tools assume you speak English, use Silicon Valley banks, and host in Virginia. We built the opposite.
items: Arabic-first UX, RTL in every surface
Infrastructure in UAE North — your data doesn't leave the region
Bilingual agent trained to reason in both languages

cta.title: The coding studio the Gulf has been waiting for.
cta.subtitle: Free while we're in early access. Bring your project, bring your ideas — we'll bring the infrastructure.

footer.tag: Built in the Gulf, for the Gulf.
